a:T4204,<div class="question">
<p>The graph shows the mitotic index in the roots of lentil plants at different distances from the end of the root.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p style="text-align:center;">[Source: <em>Physiologia Plantarum</em>, Volume 105, Issue 1, January 1999, Pages 171–178, Effect of microgravity on the cell cycle<br/>in the lentil root F. Yu, D. Driss-Ecole, J. Rembur, V. Legué, G. Perbal Wiley Online Library: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.<br/>com/doi/abs/10.1034/j.1399-3054.1999.105125.x]</p>
<p style="text-align:center;"> </p>
<p style="text-align:left;">What can be deduced from the graph?</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">A. As the distance from the end of the root increases, more cells are undergoing mitosis.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">B. At 0.5 mm from the end of the root, most of the cells are in prophase.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">C. There were fewer cells observed at 1.5 mm than at 0.5 mm.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">D. As the distance from the end of the root increases, the percentage of cells in interphase increases.</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/1/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","1"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"21N.1.SL.TZ0.5"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"21N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","1-6-cell-division"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>D</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
